examples: The spectrum of the micromaser injected with ultracold V-type three-level atoms is studied.
Electromagnetically induced transparency and slow light in ultracold Bose gas were investigated.
The phase diagram of a homogenous ultracold Fermi gas with spin polarization is studied at unitarity.
This ultracold experiment is also ultra-fast - the longest lived Rydberg molecule survives for just 18 microseconds.
